candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: First obtain the Fourier series of the waveform below in the figure. Then find the sum of the first four terms of the series at $t = 2$.

metadata.question_zh: 给定周期函数 $f(t)$ 的波形如<image 1>所示,求该函数在时间 $t=2$ 时的傅里叶级数前四项之和。
